# daytona_sandbox_logs (Data Source)

Reads bounded OpenTelemetry logs for a Daytona sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_logs" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
  from       = "2026-01-02T03:04:05Z"
  to         = "2026-01-02T04:04:05Z"
  limit      = 50

  severities = ["ERROR", "WARN"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `from` (String) Start of the time range as an RFC3339 timestamp.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `to` (String) End of the time range as an RFC3339 timestamp.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of log entries to return. Defaults to 100.
- `page` (Number) Page number to request. Defaults to 1.
- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.
- `search` (String) Optional search text for log bodies.
- `severities` (List of String) Optional severity filters such as `DEBUG`, `INFO`, `WARN`, or `ERROR`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned log entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `total` (Number) Total matching log entries.
- `total_pages` (Number) Total result pages.

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `body` (String, Sensitive) Log message body.
- `log_attributes` (Map of String, Sensitive) Log-specific OpenTelemetry attributes.
- `resource_attributes` (Map of String, Sensitive) OpenTelemetry resource attributes.
- `service_name` (String) Service name that generated the log.
- `severity_number` (Number) Severity level number, when available.
- `severity_text` (String) Severity level text.
- `span_id` (String) Associated span ID, when available.
- `timestamp` (String) Log timestamp.
- `trace_id` (String) Associated trace ID, when available.
